example.title: Revoked material package still downloadable by school
example.expected_behavior: Revoked package must block all downloads and signed URL creation.
example.actual_behavior: School download endpoint grants signed URL after package_status=revoked.
example.root_cause: Download endpoint trusted cached release status and did not recheck revocation state.
